            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = aa_cannon_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # fighter3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = fighter3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

    # iw_medium_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }

            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_large_airframe — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber1 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber_a — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_strategic_bomber_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (10 techs) ──

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# med_maritime3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber_a
#   year=1955 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_road_to_56 = {
    # early_bomber — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # med_maritime1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = med_maritime1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = med_maritime1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # med_maritime2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = med_maritime2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = med_maritime2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # med_maritime3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = med_maritime3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = med_maritime3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber_a — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) ──

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport_road_to_56 = {
    # early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_decryption_3
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_computing_machine_3
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_b]

# modern_radio
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_computing_machine_4
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[streamlined_line_c]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_road_to_56 = {
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = mechanical_computing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_radio — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # computing_machine — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_encryption — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_encryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_decryption — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = basic_decryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # r56_centralized_military_research_and_development — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = r56_centralized_military_research_and_development }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = r56_centralized_military_research_and_development
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_computing_machine — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_encryption — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_encryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_decryption — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_decryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_radio — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_radio
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # etax_great_leap — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = etax_great_leap }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = etax_great_leap
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # etax_inclusive_science — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = etax_inclusive_science }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = etax_inclusive_science
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_encryption — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_encryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_decryption — 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_decryption
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # semi_modern_radio — 1944

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1951 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }

    # modern_radio — 1953

            NOT = { has_technology = modern_radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_computing_machine_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            has_technology = streamlined_line_c
        }
        add_technology = future_computing_machine_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_road_to_56 = {
    # etax_doctrine — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = etax_doctrine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = etax_doctrine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # steel_production_1 — 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = steel_production_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = steel_production_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # butadiene_processing — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = butadiene_processing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = butadiene_processing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # butadiene_processing — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = butadiene_processing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

    }

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (7 techs) ──

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# etax_the_bomb
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_road_to_56 = {
    # atomic_research — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # etax_the_bomb — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = etax_the_bomb }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = etax_the_bomb
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (16 techs) ──

# rdf0
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_identification_friend_or_foe
#   year=1937 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf1
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1946 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf5
#   year=1949 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_2
#   year=1949 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# rdf6
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_3
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_road_to_56 = {
    # rdf0 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rdf0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio_detection — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_identification_friend_or_foe — 1937
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_identification_friend_or_foe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1937 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = basic_identification_friend_or_foe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rdf1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = rdf1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = phased_array
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf2 — 1942

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # monopulse_radar — 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = monopulse_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rdf3 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rdf3 }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

        add_technology = rdf4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # rdf5 — 1949

        limit = {

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

        add_technology = rdf5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # future_radar_2 — 1949
    if = {

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_AIR (10 techs) ──

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air_road_to_56 = {
    # interwar_antiair — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_a — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_b — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_c — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_c }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_c
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_d — 1951
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_d
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_e — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# mountain_tanks

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_b
#   year=1945 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_c
#   year=1948 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_d
#   year=1951 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_e
#   year=1954 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_road_to_56 = {
    # mountain_tanks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = antitank5 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_a
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_b — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_technology = antitank_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_c }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # antitank_d — 1951

            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_d
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # antitank_e — 1954

            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1954 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_e
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery_road_to_56 = {
    # r56_gw_railway_gun — 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = r56_gw_railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = r56_gw_railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # r56_railway_mortar_subtech — 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = r56_railway_mortar_subtech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # railway_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 — 1939

            NOT = { has_technology = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery4 — 1942

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_variable_time_fuze_shells — 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery_a — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery_b — 1945

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery_d — 1951

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1951 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery_d
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery_e — 1954

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1954 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    # basic_heavy_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # r56_heavy_tank_studies_tech — 1937
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = r56_heavy_tank_studies_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1937 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = r56_heavy_tank_studies_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }

    # advanced_heavy_tank — 1943

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

arm_grant_land_infantry_road_to_56 = {
    # support_weapons — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1933 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons1 — 1936

            NOT = { has_technology = survival_training }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = survival_training
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (21 techs) ──

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1930 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car1
#   year=1930 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1939 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car3
#   year=1942 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1944 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_a
#   year=1945 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1945 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_b
#   year=1949 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry_a
#   year=1949 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# oscillating_turret_tech
#   year=1950 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    # gwtank — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis — 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car1 — 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car2 — 1939

            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

# tech_trucks
#   year=1920 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_rocket_unit
#   year=1939 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[rocket_artillery]

arm_grant_land_motorised_road_to_56 = {
    # tech_trucks — 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_rocket_unit — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            has_technology = rocket_artillery
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_road_to_56 = {
    # tech_support — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_train — 1920
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1920 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sniper_rifle — 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sniper_rifle }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_road_to_56 = {
    # basic_light_td — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art — 1934

    }
